# Tundra Talent

> Tundra Talent is an Alaska-based skilled trades staffing company serving the oil & gas (upstream, midstream, and downstream), mining, and construction industries. It recruits from a nationwide network and places workers exclusively on Alaska projects, handling recruiting, vetting, fly-in/fly-out mobilization, man-camp housing, payroll, and compliance end to end.

Tundra Talent is headquartered in Fairbanks, Alaska, with offices in Anchorage and Prudhoe Bay (Deadhorse). It specializes in remote and demanding projects across Alaska, including the North Slope. The company sources, vets, mobilizes, houses, and manages skilled tradespeople so its clients can focus on the work. Safety and credential compliance (DOT, OSHA) are built into every placement.

## Key facts

- Company: Tundra Talent, LLC
- Industry: Skilled trades / workforce staffing agency
- Headquarters: 300 Barnette Street, Suite 202, Fairbanks, AK 99701
- Offices: Fairbanks (corporate HQ), Anchorage, Prudhoe Bay / Deadhorse
- Phone: (907) 600-4304
- Email: info@tundra-talent.com
- Website: https://www.tundra-talent.com
- Jobs portal: https://jobs.tundra-talent.com
- Service area: Alaska (works exclusively in Alaska; sources talent nationwide)
- Industries served: oil & gas (upstream, midstream, downstream), mining, construction

## Services

- Contract labor, contract-to-hire, and direct placement of skilled trades
- Trades staffed: electricians, welders, heavy equipment operators, pipefitters, riggers, roustabouts, drillers, crane operators, rig mechanics, safety officers, ironworkers, carpenters, millwrights, laborers, foremen, and superintendents
- Fly-in/fly-out (FIFO) and drive-in/drive-out (DIDO) crew rotations (2&2, 3&3, 4&2, custom)
- Man-camp housing in Deadhorse and Fairbanks, plus per diem and travel logistics
- Payroll, taxes, and workers' compensation insurance carried by Tundra Talent
- Davis-Bacon prevailing-wage compliance and certified payroll (WH-347) for federally funded projects
- 24/7 mobilization and rapid replacement
- Workforce technology: digital onboarding, credential and expiration tracking, mobile timekeeping, client visibility

## Why clients choose Tundra Talent

- Deep North Slope and remote-Alaska logistics experience
- Nationwide talent network, scaled to seasonal and project peaks
- Safety-first: every placement is vetted, screened, and credential-verified before mobilization
- One accountable partner that handles recruiting, travel, housing, payroll, and compliance
- Responsive, personalized service with a single point of contact

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.tundra-talent.com/): Overview of skilled trades staffing for Alaska oil & gas, mining, and construction.
- [Workforce Solutions](https://www.tundra-talent.com/services.html): Staffing models, the turnkey process, FIFO/DIDO mobilization, man-camp housing, payroll, and Davis-Bacon certified payroll.
- [Industries](https://www.tundra-talent.com/industries.html): Oil & gas (upstream, midstream, downstream), mining, and construction, with the roles staffed in each.
- [Safety & Technology](https://www.tundra-talent.com/safety.html): Safety and credentialing standards plus the workforce technology used.
- [About](https://www.tundra-talent.com/about.html): Company background, the three Alaska offices, and the leadership team.
- [Contact](https://www.tundra-talent.com/contact.html): Request talent or apply for work; offices and dispatch line.
